title: Franchising | Xponential
meta_description: Xponential Fitness is the largest fitness franchise group of boutique fitness brands across verticals, including Pilates, Barre, Stretching, Boxing, and more.
body_markdown:
This website uses tracking technologies (collectively, “cookies”) to share your personal information with our affiliates, partners, and service providers to personalize your experience on our Online Services, including analyzing and tracking your activities on our websites, and to tailor advertising to your interests. Choosing to reject some or all cookies may impact your experience. Please see our [Privacy Policy](https://www.xponential.com/privacy-policy "Privacy Policy") for more information.

# Franchising
##### Join Us
[ Inquire for Information > ](https://www.xponential.com/franchising#apply-to-franchise-form)
#### Bring an Xponential Brand to your Community
With 3,000+ studios across the globe, Xponential Fitness is a curator of globally and nationally recognized boutique health and wellness brands across a variety of verticals including Pilates, barre, stretching, yoga, and strength training.
With many of our brands ranked in industry growth awards like Entrepreneur Magazine’s Franchise 500 and the Inc. 5000 list each year, our brands continue to lead in the boutique fitness, health and wellness space.
### What our Franchisees Think of Us
![Pure Barre Logo](https://www.xponential.com/hubfs/cli-assets/images/in-studio/logos/purebarre.svg)
Each department works so seamlessly together to provide us owners with the ability to become the level of involved owners we’d like to be. They have supported me immensely which resulted in a record-breaking year at my little studio in Alaska. They’ve created a huge level of trust. The in-person experience they provide at training just can’t be beat. I quite honestly can’t sing their praises enough and I’d argue my numbers in Anchorage do their part!
Susie Grobler
Anchorage, AK
![Yoga Six Logo](https://www.xponential.com/hubfs/XPLUS%20Creative%20Refresh/Long%20Form%20SVG%20X+%20Brand%20Logos/Yoga%20Six%20Logo.svg)
Because we had a very strong presale and so as soon as we opened our doors, we had a community.
Alain Delani & Kia Vue
SoCal, CA
![Club Pilates Logo](https://www.xponential.com/hubfs/club%20pilates%20logo.svg)
I really wanted to not only create an income stream as an absentee owner but also to create a legacy for my children and support them in the future. 
Mark Worley
Alpharetta, GA
![StretchLab logo](https://www.xponential.com/hubfs/xpass%20stretchlab%20logo.png)
StretchLab is a brand I’m proud to be a part of. Opening three existing locations, with an additional three opening in the future, with the support from Xponential and the StretchLab team, has been a truly rewarding and worthwhile investment. Our members love the services, and StretchLab is complementary to all workouts and walks of life.
Terry Rackley
Multi-Unit Franchise Owner, TX
![Yoga Six Logo](https://www.xponential.com/hubfs/XPLUS%20Creative%20Refresh/Long%20Form%20SVG%20X+%20Brand%20Logos/Yoga%20Six%20Logo.svg)
I feel like we have such a connection with every person on the corporate team that there's always someone who can get back to us in a timely manner. But then just the weekly calls, the group calls for open studios or pre-sale studios, the recordings of these calls on the LMS platform that we use to share information and train with, is so helpful.
Tania Rupp
Orlando, FL
![Club Pilates Logo](https://www.xponential.com/hubfs/club%20pilates%20logo.svg)
I own different franchises and different concepts outside of Xponential. Their team has been fantastic for support. I've been with the franchise since 2015. I've watched it grow. My studios have grown. I started with one unit, now up to seven, and recently acquired the master franchise rights for Switzerland, Ireland, and France.
Chris Fichaud
Texas, Switzerland, France & Ireland
![StretchLab logo](https://www.xponential.com/hubfs/xpass%20stretchlab%20logo.png)
Not only just through Zoom calls and speaking with the StretchLab team, but also in-studio visits from our regional sales manager, Jason, and they respond quickly. They're always available and it's something that, like I said, has helped us continue to grow and solve a lot of issues that we've seen along the way.
Matt Duffy
Tucson, AZ
![Pure Barre Logo](https://www.xponential.com/hubfs/cli-assets/images/in-studio/logos/purebarre.svg)
We have a very deep love for our brand. I started out as a client, became a teacher, and then came on to own my own studio. So I feel like it's our love for the brand, it's our love for our clients and our technique, and what we can do for our members.
Alicia Saxton
Geneva, IL
![Pure Barre Logo](https://www.xponential.com/hubfs/cli-assets/images/in-studio/logos/purebarre.svg)

They have supported me immensely which resulted in a record-breaking year at my little studio in Alaska. They’ve created a huge level of trust. ### Why own an Xponential Franchise?
Xponential Fitness has the resources, platform, and network to ensure continued growth and support for our franchise partners.
###### Real Estate
Our expert team will guide you through the entire process, from site selection to lease execution, to find the ideal site for your studio.
![Y6_Riverstone-1](https://www.xponential.com/hubfs/cli-assets/images/franchising/Y6_Riverstone-1.jpg)
###### Construction and Design
We’ll guide you through the entire buildout process from approved layout and general construction to interior design, music, and technology.
![construction design yogasix 2](https://www.xponential.com/hubfs/Yoga-six%202024/construction%20design%20yogasix%202.png)
###### Integrated Sales Platform & Support
Comprehensive & ongoing sales training, monthly calls & expert guidance from pre-sale through to Grand Opening & into sustainability.
![DNA_CP_Boston-261-0662](https://www.xponential.com/hubfs/cli-assets/images/franchising/DNA_CP_Boston-261-0662.jpg)
###### Studio Recruitment
Receive ongoing assistance hiring the most qualified teachers, general managers, and sales team.
![Xpo Franchising replacement 720x400](https://www.xponential.com/hubfs/Xpo%20Franchising%20replacement%20720x400.png)
###### Marketing
The minute your LOI is executed, the marketing of your studio begins, with personalized support to ensure you generate maximum leads.
![IMG_3238 1](https://www.xponential.com/hubfs/cli-assets/images/franchising/IMG_3238%201.jpg)

#### The Xponential Brands
![Women doing Pilates](https://www.xponential.com/hubfs/cli-assets/images/franchising/xponential-brands/clubpilates.jpg) ![open modal](https://www.xponential.com/hubfs/cli-assets/images/utility/plus-circle.svg)
![Club Pilates Logo](https://www.xponential.com/hubfs/cli-assets/images/franchising/xponential-brands/logos/clubpilates.svg)
Close ![close modal button](https://www.xponential.com/hubfs/cli-assets/images/utility/close-modal.svg)
![Club Pilates Logo](https://www.xponential.com/hubfs/cli-assets/images/main-page/brands-logo/clubpilates.svg)
Club Pilates
Club Pilates is the largest Pilates brand globally, offering low-impact, full-body Reformer-based workouts designed with the vision of making Pilates more accessible, approachable and welcoming to everyone. Based in Irvine, CA, Club Pilates has appeared in both Entrepreneur Magazine's Franchise 500, Fastest-Growing Franchises five years running, and Inc. Magazine's Inc. 5000 lists multiple times. 
  * Investment Range | $385,048 to $839,058
  * Liquid Capital Req. | $250,000
  * Net Worth Minimum | $500,000

*Please see Item 7 In Club Pilates 2025 FDD for explanatory notes & details. 
![Man doing Yoga](https://www.xponential.com/hubfs/cli-assets/images/franchising/xponential-brands/yogasix.jpg) ![open modal](https://www.xponential.com/hubfs/cli-assets/images/utility/plus-circle.svg)
![YogaSix Logo](https://www.xponential.com/hubfs/cli-assets/images/franchising/xponential-brands/logos/yogasix.svg)
Close ![close modal button](https://www.xponential.com/hubfs/cli-assets/images/utility/close-modal.svg)
![YogaSix Logo](https://www.xponential.com/hubfs/cli-assets/images/main-page/brands-logo/yogasix.svg)
YogaSix
YogaSix is the largest franchised yoga brand that offers a broad range of heated and non-heated yoga classes, boot camp-style fitness classes and meditation accessible to all. Classes at YogaSix eliminate the intimidation factor that many people feel when trying yoga for the first time, offering a fresh perspective on one of the world's oldest fitness practices. 
  * Investment Range | $529,233 to $826,265
  * Liquid Capital Req. | $250,000
  * Net Worth Minimum | $500,000

*Please see Item 7 In YogaSix 2025 FDD for explanatory notes & details. 
![Woman doing a deadlift](https://www.xponential.com/hubfs/cli-assets/images/franchising/xponential-brands/bft.jpg) ![open modal](https://www.xponential.com/hubfs/cli-assets/images/utility/plus-circle.svg)
![BFT Logo](https://www.xponential.com/hubfs/cli-assets/images/franchising/xponential-brands/logos/bft.svg)
Close ![close modal button](https://www.xponential.com/hubfs/cli-assets/images/utility/close-modal.svg)
![BFT Logo](https://www.xponential.com/hubfs/cli-assets/images/main-page/brands-logo/bft.svg)
BFT
Founded in 2017 in Melbourne, Australia by fitness industry veteran Cameron Falloon, BFT offers a community-based 50-minute functional training and strength-based program across 13 workouts. BFT uses science and technology-based training techniques to drive individual member health goals in an inclusive, coach-led group environment.
  * Investment Range | $509,836 to $1,204,045 
  * Liquid Capital Req. | $250,000
  * Net Worth Minimum | $500,000


*Please see Item 7 in BFT's 2025 FDD for explanatory notes & details.
![Woman doing Barre](https://www.xponential.com/hubfs/cli-assets/images/franchising/xponential-brands/purebarre.jpg) ![open modal](https://www.xponential.com/hubfs/cli-assets/images/utility/plus-circle.svg)
![Pure Barre Logo](https://www.xponential.com/hubfs/cli-assets/images/franchising/xponential-brands/logos/purebarre.svg)
Close ![close modal button](https://www.xponential.com/hubfs/cli-assets/images/utility/close-modal.svg)
![Pure Barre Logo](https://www.xponential.com/hubfs/cli-assets/images/main-page/brands-logo/purebarre.svg)
Pure Barre
Pure Barre is the largest barre brand, offering a range of effective, low-impact, high-intensity full-body barre workouts for a broad range of fitness levels. Pure Barre has four signature class formats, including introductory, classic barre, interval training, and resistance training. 
  * Investment Range | $314,411 to $629,345
  * Liquid Capital Req. | $250,000
  * Net Worth Minimum | $500,000

*Please see Item 7 In Pure Barre 2025 FDD for explanatory notes & details. 
![Woman Stretching a Man](https://www.xponential.com/hubfs/cli-assets/images/franchising/xponential-brands/stretchlab.jpg) ![open modal](https://www.xponential.com/hubfs/cli-assets/images/utility/plus-circle.svg)
![StretchLab Logo](https://www.xponential.com/hubfs/cli-assets/images/franchising/xponential-brands/logos/stretchlab.svg)
Close ![close modal button](https://www.xponential.com/hubfs/cli-assets/images/utility/close-modal.svg)
![StretchLab Logo](https://www.xponential.com/hubfs/cli-assets/images/main-page/brands-logo/stretchlab.svg)
StretchLab
StretchLab is the largest assisted stretching brand globally that was created to help people through customized flexibility services. Led by highly trained Flexologists™, StretchLab offers one-on-one and group-assisted stretching sessions to customers across a broad range of age and fitness levels in a welcoming, fun, and community-focused environment.
  * Investment Range | $269,019 to $610,224
  * Liquid Capital Req. | $250,000
  * Net Worth Minimum | $500,000

*Please see Item 7 in StretchLab's 2025 FDD for explanatory notes & details.
